mechanics.excerpt: Each repetition has different effects _ depending on the particular path. Characters cannot spend unlimited amounts of time in the Higher Education Stage , however. After completing Path this stage character must proceed to the next stage (Real Life) and complete at least one patn there before return- ing to take another Higher Education path.
